message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Activate test: "customer with exactly 2 years receives 20% loyalty discount on policy base premium"
Current state: 17 tests passing, 32 todo
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Note: Loyalty discount is 20% off the policy base premium (sum of item base premiums). For a single sword (100G base), 2-year customer: 100G base - 20G loyalty + 10G first insurance + 5G fee = 95G. But the test will determine exact expected value.

Important: Loyalty discount is applied to the policy base premium total, not each item individually. The first insurance surcharge is per-item flat 10G (not affected by loyalty).

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim (both Compilation
Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.

content.text: I'll start by reading the test file and implementation file to understand the current state.
Now I'll activate the loyalty discount test. Based on the spec note: 100G base - 20G loyalty + 10G first insurance + 5G fee = 95G.
